name: io.github.MGrin/scani
description: Personal finance management MCP server for AI agents. Track portfolios, holdings, and wallets across banks, brokerages, and crypto exchanges. Agents self-register without human interaction and pay per-call with USDC on Base via the x402 micropayment protocol.

environmentVariables.name: SCANI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token obtained by calling agent_register (no human sign-up needed). Call the agent_register tool once with no auth to receive a permanent API key.
